seoTitle: Wura vs Wurtulla — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wura and Wurtulla. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wura and Wurtulla.
heading: Wura vs Wurtulla — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wura, Queensland and Wurtulla, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wurtulla has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Wura (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wura or Wurtulla safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wura has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Wurtulla scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wura scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Wurtulla scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wura or Wurtulla?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wurtulla has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
